description: Business Update: Jan–Mar 2026 — Commercial Activity deck for SettleMint leadership (Gyan, exec team)

slides.title: 60-Day Pipeline Snapshot
slides.item1:
**22 New Deals**
Total pipeline created: ~$1.8M in 60 days across APAC, Middle East, and Europe. New opportunities span banking, real estate tokenization, and government RFP programmes.
slides.item2:
**2 Deals Won**
$70,691 closed revenue: Maybank Tokenization Pilot ($60K, Jan 30) and NTT East Phase 2 ($10.7K, Feb 18). Two validated production engagements in APAC.
slides.item3:
**$1.3M Renewal**
OCBC 2-year on-prem Besu license at Contract Sent stage — 80% probability. Most critical deal in the current pipeline. Close imminent.
slides.item4:
**$300K RFP**
Qatar Ministry of Justice Real Estate Tokenization RFP at 80% probability. Proposal/Contract stage. Closing March 31, 2026. Advanced Middle East government opportunity.

slides.title: Deal Highlights
slides.subtitle: New opportunities across APAC and the Middle East dominate the 60-day period

slides.title: New Opportunities: Jan–Mar 2026
slides.body: 22 new deals · ~$1.8M pipeline · Jan–Mar 2026 · APAC, Middle East & Europe

slides.title: Closed & Key Themes
slides.col1:
**Deals Won (60 Days)**
• Maybank Tokenization Pilot — $60K — Jan 30
• NTT East Phase 2 — $10.7K — Feb 18
• Total: $70,691 revenue recognized
• Win rate context: 2 out of 32 deals active in the period
slides.col2:
**Commercial Themes**
• APAC expansion underway — Japan, Malaysia, HK, India in pipeline
• Real estate tokenization emerging as vertical — Qatar, Botswana, MiPool
• OCBC as anchor — $1.9M combined renewal + HK expansion
• Middle East government RFP activity accelerating
• Japanese community banking: new cluster of 4 banks entered pipeline
